{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Yerin's Goldsign blades
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] uses [[Goldsign]] blades poised over her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has [[sword]]-arms.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
